title: lippia radula
intro: Lippia radula, also known as African tea or sweet bush, is a plant species in the verbena family, commonly found in tropical regions of Africa and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts and essential oils have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Lippia radula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
